title: Mechanised resin extraction method
author: Rodriguez García, Aida
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The borehole at height method enhances yields with less effort and greater efficiency. Long-term studies are needed for broader validation, and effective communication between field workers and researchers is essential for credible data and practical implementation.
steps_raw: The borehole at height method enhances yields with less effort and greater efficiency. Long-term studies are needed for broader validation, and effective communication between field workers and researchers is essential for credible data and practical implementation.
